narrative:
Precinct Island Creek (precinct in Jefferson County) has 659 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.6%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
